name: obsidian-bridge
description: Connect Codex to Obsidian with visual, per-vault permissions for reading, writing, editing, moving and trashing notes.

interface.shortDescription: Guided setup for safe Obsidian access
interface.longDescription: Run the guided Windows installer, then choose protected folders, autonomous create/append, or explicitly grant selected full-vault management permissions. Separate MCP processes and Bridge Control recheck every grant, create recovery backups, audit outcomes, and never expose permanent deletion or arbitrary commands.
defaultPrompt: Find my Obsidian notes about a project and summarize them with citations.
Show recent Obsidian notes and identify related backlinks.
Use my Bridge Control permissions to safely update, move, or trash an Obsidian note.
